calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Distributing Surplus Fundstofredlanderf.Martin
Off Calendar Jul-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mary Tang, (925)678-1878 for Climant/Moving party Fredlander Martin.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CLAIMANT FREDLANDER MARTIN'S Motion For Order Distributing Surplus Funds to Fredlander F. Martin is GRANTED, (1) $809.86 and interest accrued thereon, if any, shall be distributed to the City and County of San Francisco; (2) the remainder, with interest accrued thereon, if any, shall be distributed to Fredlander P. Martin and Sherry Jane I. Martin. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CLEAR RECON CORP.'s Motion For Order To Deposit Surplus Funds is OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. Judge: Rebecca A. Wiseman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Continued Hearing On Motion For Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mary Tang, Esq. (925-678-1876) for Respondent/Moving party Fredlander Martin through Court Call.
No Other Appearance.

Respondent did not comply with the tentative ruling rule. Respondent ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT FREDLANDER MARTIN's Motion For Order To Deposit Surplus Funds is GRANTED. $507,866.72 shall be deposited with the Court forthwith. Respondent shall set a hearing on its claim thereafter. Respondent's request for accounting is denied. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Rebecca A. Wiseman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Feb-05-2016 Continued To Mar-04-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CLEAR RECON CORP.'s Motion For Order To Deposit Surplus Funds is continued to March 4, 2016. Respondent to provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than February 19, 2016 with cover letter reflecting new hearing Date. SFLR 2.6B. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
